arts.ttl: What Emiliano Martínez Expects From Hostile French Crowd in Aston Villa-PSG Champions League Tie
arts.sum: The FIFA international break is over, and club football is back, with the UEFA Champions League quarterfinals taking center stage. Paris Saint-Germain will take on Aston Villa for a place in the semifinals. PSG is coming off a dramatic Round of 16 win over Liverpool, sealing the victory in a tense penalty shootout. arts.ttl: Marseille condemn 'personal attacks' on Rabiot at PSG
arts.sum: Marseille condemn the "personal attacks" aimed at midfielder Adrien Rabiot and his family during the 3-1 defeat at Paris St-Germain on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Barcelona Defended by Spanish Press as Ousmane Dembele Slammed for Cryptic Instagram Activity
arts.sum: Ousmane Dembele, who has been in top form since the start of 2025, sparked speculation on Wednesday by changing his Instagram profile picture to an old photo of him and Gavi from their time together in Barcelona. arts.ttl: Liverpool Willing to Pivot From Alexander Isak, Eye ‘Wiry Frame’ £67M-Rated Star Who PSG Have Sell-On
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain will closely monitor Hugo Ekitike’s potential transfer to Eintracht Frankfurt, as the club is set to receive a percentage of the transfer fee. A previous report from CaughtOffside reveals that Newcastle are eyeing Ekitike as a possible replacement for Alexander Isak.
